required_preferences.fact: Joins Sunday brunch with her sister via video call during travel weeks — only attends in-person when in Chicago

supersedes.fact: Rotates Sunday brunch locations with her older sister, often bringing meals or groceries to her sister’s home instead of hosting at her own condo every week

required_preferences.fact: Attends in-person yoga classes at her neighborhood studio weekly, as she no longer avoids all group classes since her routine now requires her to be onsite downtown five days a week

supersedes.fact: Participates only in solo yoga sessions at home, following recorded videos or apps — avoids all in-person and live-streamed group classes due to doctor’s instructions

required_preferences.fact: Keeps a detailed daily log (paper or digital) to track Luna’s fluid administration, medication doses, and symptoms — never relies on memory or informal notes
Uses corticosteroid inhaler before any physical activity at home as part of her new symptom management routine
Performs daily morning and evening blood pressure checks at home and logs all readings manually in a dedicated health journal — never skips a check, even on busy days
Experiments with new vegetarian recipes each weekend — never repeats the same dish in a single month

persona: A mid-level business analyst at a multinational retail corporation
